tools.name: bulk_extractor
tools.description: Scan a disk image for emails, URLs, cards, and other carved artifacts without parsing the filesystem. On this host the installed binary lacks libewf — it cannot read EnCase E01/EWF images (error: compiled without E01 support). For E01 evidence use Sleuth Kit instead: mmls → fls → icat or istat → blkcat, then analyze_scratch with strings/grep/sqlite3 on scratch output.

common_flags.description: Output directory (harness injects under scratch when omitted)

input.harness_usage: Raw/DD images only on this host. Harness injects -o <scratch/output> when omitted; never use /tmp. E01/EWF (.E01): do not use this tool — use SIFT-160 mmls, SIFT-148 fls, SIFT-151 icat, SIFT-136 blkcat, SIFT-155 istat, then analyze_scratch (strings, grep, sqlite3) on extracted scratch files.

tools.name: fls

input.harness_usage: List directory: extra_args=["-o", "63", "-l", "INODE"] → fls -o 63 -l IMAGE INODE. Use MFT entry number only (e.g. 23117), not name-typed form. Optional @@ in extra_args is ignored (inode always after image).
